title: WoVR: World Models as Reliable Simulators for Post-Training VLA Policies with RL
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) promises to unlock capabilities beyond imitation learning for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, but its requirement for massive real-world interaction prevents direct deployment on physical robots. Recent work attempts to use learned world models as simulators for policy optimization, yet closed-loop imagined rollouts inevitably suffer from hallucination and long-horizon error accumulation. Such errors do not merely degrade visual fidelity; they corrupt the optimization signal, encouraging policies to exploit model inaccuracies rather than genuine task progress. We propose WoVR, a reliable world-model-based reinforcement learning framework for post-training VLA policies. Instead of assuming a faithful world model, WoVR explicitly regulates how RL interacts with imperfect imagined dynamics. It improves rollout stability through a controllable action-conditioned video world model, reshapes imagined interaction to reduce effective error depth via Keyframe-Initialized Rollouts, and maintains policy-simulator alignment through World Model-Policy co-evolution. Extensive experiments on LIBERO benchmarks and real-world robotic manipulation demonstrate that WoVR enables stable long-horizon imagined rollouts and effective policy optimization, improving average LIBERO success from 39.95% to 69.2% (+29.3 points) and real-robot success from 61.7% to 91.7% (+30.0 points). These results show that learned world models can serve as practical simulators for reinforcement learning when hallucination is explicitly controlled.
tldr: The paper proposes WoVR, a novel reinforcement learning framework that uses world models as reliable simulators for post-training vision-language-action policies, achieving significant performance improvements on both simulated and real-world robotic tasks by explicitly controlling hallucination in imagined rollouts.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了WoVR，一种新颖的强化学习框架，使用世界模型作为可靠的模拟器，用于后训练视觉-语言-动作策略，通过显式控制想象rollout中的幻觉，在模拟和真实世界的机器人任务上实现了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 有望为视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型解锁超出模仿学习的能力，但它对大规模真实世界交互的需求阻碍了其在物理机器人上的直接部署。 近期工作尝试使用已学习的世界模型作为模拟器进行策略优化，然而，闭环想象展开不可避免地遭受幻觉和长时程误差累积的影响。 这些误差不仅仅降低了视觉保真度，还会破坏优化信号，鼓励策略利用模型的不准确性，而非真正的任务进展。 我们提出了 WoVR，一个可靠的基于世界模型的强化学习框架，用于后训练 VLA 策略。 WoVR 没有假设一个忠实的世界模型，而是显式地调节 RL 如何与不完美的想象动态进行交互。 它通过可控的动作条件视频世界模型来提高展开的稳定性，通过关键帧初始化展开来重塑想象交互以减少有效误差深度，并通过世界模型-策略的协同进化来保持策略-模拟器的对齐。 在 LIBERO 基准测试和真实世界机器人操作上的大量实验表明，WoVR 能够实现稳定的长时程想象展开和有效的策略优化，将 LIBERO 平均成功率从 39.95% 提高到 69.2% (+29.3 个百分点)，并将真实机器人成功率从 61.7% 提高到 91.7% (+30.0 个百分点)。 这些结果表明，当幻觉被显式控制时，已学习的世界模型可以作为强化学习的实用模拟器。

title: A Latency-Aware Framework for Visuomotor Policy Learning on Industrial Robots
summary: Industrial robots are increasingly deployed in contact-rich construction and manufacturing tasks that involve uncertainty and long-horizon execution. While learning-based visuomotor policies offer a promising alternative to open-loop control, their deployment on industrial platforms is challenged by a large observation-execution gap caused by sensing, inference, and control latency. This gap is significantly greater than on low-latency research robots due to high-level interfaces and slower closed-loop dynamics, making execution timing a critical system-level issue. This paper presents a latency-aware framework for deploying and evaluating visuomotor policies on industrial robotic arms under realistic timing constraints. The framework integrates calibrated multimodal sensing, temporally consistent synchronization, a unified communication pipeline, and a teleoperation interface for demonstration collection. Within this framework, we introduce a latency-aware execution strategy that schedules finite-horizon, policy-predicted action sequences based on temporal feasibility, enabling asynchronous inference and execution without modifying policy architectures or training. We evaluate the framework on a contact-rich industrial assembly task while systematically varying inference latency. Using identical policies and sensing pipelines, we compare latency-aware execution with blocking and naive asynchronous baselines. Results show that latency-aware execution maintains smooth motion, compliant contact behavior, and consistent task progression across a wide range of latencies while reducing idle time and avoiding instability observed in baseline methods. These findings highlight the importance of explicitly handling latency for reliable closed-loop deployment of visuomotor policies on industrial robots.
tldr: This paper introduces a latency-aware framework for deploying visuomotor policies on industrial robots, addressing the challenges posed by significant observation-execution gaps. Their latency-aware execution strategy significantly improves performance compared to baseline methods in a contact-rich assembly task under varying latencies.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个延迟感知框架，用于在工业机器人上部署视觉运动策略，解决了观察-执行间隙显著带来的挑战。他们的延迟感知执行策略在接触丰富的装配任务中，在不同延迟下，与基线方法相比，显著提高了性能。
summary_zh: 工业机器人在涉及不确定性和长周期执行的富接触建筑和制造任务中的应用日益广泛。尽管基于学习的视觉运动策略为开环控制提供了一种有前景的替代方案，但由于传感、推理和控制延迟造成的巨大观测-执行鸿沟阻碍了它们在工业平台上的部署。由于高级接口和较慢的闭环动力学，这种鸿沟远大于低延迟研究机器人，使得执行时序成为一个关键的系统级问题。本文提出了一个延迟感知框架，用于在现实的时序约束下部署和评估工业机械臂上的视觉运动策略。该框架集成了校准的多模态传感、时间一致的同步、统一的通信管道以及用于演示数据收集的遥操作界面。在此框架内，我们引入了一种延迟感知执行策略，该策略基于时间可行性来调度有限视界、策略预测的动作序列，从而实现异步推理和执行，而无需修改策略架构或训练。我们在一个富接触的工业装配任务中评估了该框架，同时系统地改变推理延迟。利用相同的策略和传感管道，我们将延迟感知执行与阻塞法和朴素异步基线方法进行了比较。结果表明，延迟感知执行在广泛的延迟范围内保持了平滑运动、顺应性接触行为和一致的任务进展，同时减少了空闲时间，避免了在基线方法中观察到的不稳定性。这些发现强调了显式处理延迟对于在工业机器人上可靠地闭环部署视觉运动策略的重要性。

title: Direction Matters: Learning Force Direction Enables Sim-to-Real Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Sim-to-real transfer for contact-rich manipulation remains challenging due to the inherent discrepancy in contact dynamics. While existing methods often rely on costly real-world data or utilize blind compliance through fixed controllers, we propose a framework that leverages expert-designed controller logic for transfer. Inspired by the success of privileged supervision in kinematic tasks, we employ a human-designed finite state machine based position/force controller in simulation to provide privileged guidance. The resulting policy is trained to predict the end-effector pose, contact state, and crucially the desired contact force direction. Unlike force magnitudes, which are highly sensitive to simulation inaccuracies, force directions encode high-level task geometry and remain robust across the sim-to-real gap. At deployment, these predictions configure a force-aware admittance controller. By combining the policy's directional intent with a constant, low-cost manually tuned force magnitude, the system generates adaptive, task-aligned compliance. This tuning is lightweight, typically requiring only a single scalar per contact state. We provide theoretical analysis for stability and robustness to disturbances. Experiments on four real-world tasks, i.e., microwave opening, peg-in-hole, whiteboard wiping, and door opening, demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms strong baselines in both success rate and robustness. Videos are available at: https://yifei-y.github.io/project-pages/DirectionMatters/.
tldr: This paper presents a sim-to-real transfer method for contact-rich manipulation tasks that learns to predict contact force direction using privileged supervision in simulation, achieving robust performance with a force-aware admittance controller and lightweight tuning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种针对接触型操作任务的模拟到现实转移方法，该方法利用模拟中的特权监督学习预测接触力的方向，通过力感知的顺应性控制器和轻量级调整实现了稳健的性能。
summary_zh: 对于富接触操作而言，从仿真到真实的迁移仍然具有挑战性，这是由于接触动力学本身存在的差异。虽然现有方法通常依赖于昂贵的真实世界数据或者通过固定控制器利用盲目顺应性，但我们提出了一种框架，该框架利用专家设计的控制器逻辑来进行迁移。受到运动学任务中特权监督的成功的启发，我们在仿真中使用人类设计的基于有限状态机的位姿/力控制器来提供特权指导。由此产生的策略被训练来预测末端执行器的姿态、接触状态，以及至关重要的期望接触力方向。与对仿真不准确性高度敏感的力大小不同，力方向编码了高层次的任务几何结构，并在仿真到真实的差距中保持鲁棒性。在部署时，这些预测配置了一个力感知导纳控制器。通过将策略的方向意图与一个恒定的、低成本的手动调整的力大小相结合，系统生成自适应的、任务对齐的顺应性。这种调整很轻量级，通常每个接触状态只需要一个标量。我们提供了关于稳定性和对扰动的鲁棒性的理论分析。在四个真实世界任务（即微波炉打开、孔插销、白板擦拭和开门）上的实验表明，我们的方法在成功率和鲁棒性方面均显著优于强大的基线。视频可在以下网址获得：https://yifei-y.github.io/project-pages/DirectionMatters/。

title: ProAct: A Dual-System Framework for Proactive Embodied Social Agents
summary: Embodied social agents have recently advanced in generating synchronized speech and gestures. However, most interactive systems remain fundamentally reactive, responding only to current sensory inputs within a short temporal window. Proactive social behavior, in contrast, requires deliberation over accumulated context and intent inference, which conflicts with the strict latency budget of real-time interaction. We present \emph{ProAct}, a dual-system framework that reconciles this time-scale conflict by decoupling a low-latency \emph{Behavioral System} for streaming multimodal interaction from a slower \emph{Cognitive System} which performs long-horizon social reasoning and produces high-level proactive intentions. To translate deliberative intentions into continuous non-verbal behaviors without disrupting fluency, we introduce a streaming flow-matching model conditioned on intentions via ControlNet. This mechanism supports asynchronous intention injection, enabling seamless transitions between reactive and proactive gestures within a single motion stream. We deploy ProAct on a physical humanoid robot and evaluate both motion quality and interactive effectiveness. In real-world interaction user studies, participants and observers consistently prefer ProAct over reactive variants in perceived proactivity, social presence, and overall engagement, demonstrating the benefits of dual-system proactive control for embodied social interaction.
tldr: This paper introduces ProAct, a dual-system framework for proactive embodied social agents, decoupling real-time multimodal interaction from long-horizon social reasoning to achieve more engaging and socially present interactions with a physical humanoid robot.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了ProAct，一个用于主动式具身社交代理的双系统框架，它将实时多模态交互与长时程社交推理分离，以实现与物理人形机器人的更具吸引力和社交临场感的交互。
summary_zh: 具身社交智能体在生成同步的语音和姿势方面取得了最新进展。然而，大多数交互系统本质上仍然是被动的，仅在较短的时间窗口内对当前的感官输入作出反应。相比之下，主动社交行为需要对累积的上下文进行推敲和意图推断，这与实时交互的严格延迟预算相冲突。我们提出\emph{ProAct}，一种双系统框架，通过将用于流式多模态交互的低延迟\emph{行为系统}与执行长时域社交推理并产生高级主动意图的较慢速\emph{认知系统}解耦，来调和这种时间尺度冲突。为了在不中断流畅性的前提下，将深思熟虑的意图转化为连续的非语言行为，我们引入了一种通过ControlNet以意图为条件的流式流匹配模型。这种机制支持异步意图注入，从而在一个运动流中实现被动和主动姿势之间的无缝过渡。我们将ProAct部署在物理人形机器人上，并评估了运动质量和交互有效性。在现实世界的交互用户研究中，参与者和观察者在感知到的主动性、社交存在感和整体参与度方面，一致地更喜欢 ProAct 而非被动变体，证明了双系统主动控制对具身社交交互的益处。

title: RoboAug: One Annotation to Hundreds of Scenes via Region-Contrastive Data Augmentation for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Enhancing the generalization capability of robotic learning to enable robots to operate effectively in diverse, unseen scenes is a fundamental and challenging problem. Existing approaches often depend on pretraining with large-scale data collection, which is labor-intensive and time-consuming, or on semantic data augmentation techniques that necessitate an impractical assumption of flawless upstream object detection in real-world scenarios. In this work, we propose RoboAug, a novel generative data augmentation framework that significantly minimizes the reliance on large-scale pretraining and the perfect visual recognition assumption by requiring only the bounding box annotation of a single image during training. Leveraging this minimal information, RoboAug employs pre-trained generative models for precise semantic data augmentation and integrates a plug-and-play region-contrastive loss to help models focus on task-relevant regions, thereby improving generalization and boosting task success rates. We conduct extensive real-world experiments on three robots, namely UR-5e, AgileX, and Tien Kung 2.0, spanning over 35k rollouts. Empirical results demonstrate that RoboAug significantly outperforms state-of-the-art data augmentation baselines. Specifically, when evaluating generalization capabilities in unseen scenes featuring diverse combinations of backgrounds, distractors, and lighting conditions, our method achieves substantial gains over the baseline without augmentation. The success rates increase from 0.09 to 0.47 on UR-5e, from 0.16 to 0.60 on AgileX, and from 0.19 to 0.67 on Tien Kung 2.0. These results highlight the superior generalization and effectiveness of RoboAug in real-world manipulation tasks. Our project is available at https://x-roboaug.github.io/.
tldr: The paper introduces RoboAug, a novel data augmentation framework for robotic manipulation that uses a single annotated image and pre-trained generative models to improve generalization in unseen scenes, achieving significant performance gains compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了RoboAug，一种新颖的机器人操作数据增强框架，它使用单个带注释的图像和预训练的生成模型来提高在未见场景中的泛化能力，与最先进的基线相比，实现了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 增强机器人学习的泛化能力，使机器人能够在多样化的、未见场景中有效运行，是一个基础且具有挑战性的问题。现有方法通常依赖于大规模数据收集的预训练（这需要大量的人力和时间），或者依赖于语义数据增强技术（这需要假设在真实场景中上游目标检测是完美无缺的，而这不切实际）。在这项工作中，我们提出了RoboAug，一种新颖的生成式数据增强框架，它通过在训练期间仅需单个图像的边界框标注，就能显著减少对大规模预训练和完美视觉识别假设的依赖。利用这种最小化的信息，RoboAug采用预训练的生成模型进行精确的语义数据增强，并集成了一个即插即用的区域对比损失，以帮助模型关注任务相关的区域，从而提高泛化能力并提高任务成功率。我们对UR-5e、AgileX和天弓2.0这三种机器人在真实环境中进行了广泛的实验，跨越超过3.5万次 rollout。实验结果表明，RoboAug显著优于最先进的数据增强基线。具体而言，当评估在包含背景、干扰物和光照条件等多样化组合的未见场景中的泛化能力时，我们的方法相对于没有增强的基线取得了显著的提升。在UR-5e上，成功率从0.09提升到0.47，在AgileX上从0.16提升到0.60，在天弓2.0上从0.19提升到0.67。 这些结果突出了RoboAug在真实世界操作任务中的卓越泛化能力和有效性。我们的项目可在https://x-roboaug.github.io/ 获取。

title: Enabling Option Learning in Sparse Rewards with Hindsight Experience Replay
summary: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (HRL) frameworks like Option-Critic (OC) and Multi-updates Option Critic (MOC) have introduced significant advancements in learning reusable options. However, these methods underperform in multi-goal environments with sparse rewards, where actions must be linked to temporally distant outcomes. To address this limitation, we first propose MOC-HER, which integrates the Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) mechanism into the MOC framework. By relabeling goals from achieved outcomes, MOC-HER can solve sparse reward environments that are intractable for the original MOC. However, this approach is insufficient for object manipulation tasks, where the reward depends on the object reaching the goal rather than on the agent's direct interaction. This makes it extremely difficult for HRL agents to discover how to interact with these objects. To overcome this issue, we introduce Dual Objectives Hindsight Experience Replay (2HER), a novel extension that creates two sets of virtual goals. In addition to relabeling goals based on the object's final state (standard HER), 2HER also generates goals from the agent's effector positions, rewarding the agent for both interacting with the object and completing the task. Experimental results in robotic manipulation environments show that MOC-2HER achieves success rates of up to 90%, compared to less than 11% for both MOC and MOC-HER. These results highlight the effectiveness of our dual objective relabeling strategy in sparse reward, multi-goal tasks.
tldr: The paper introduces two extensions to Multi-updates Option Critic (MOC) using Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) to improve performance in sparse-reward robotic manipulation environments, achieving significantly higher success rates compared to the original MOC and MOC-HER.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了两种使用后见经验回放（HER）对Multi-updates Option Critic（MOC）的扩展方法，以提高在稀疏奖励机器人操作环境中的性能，与原始MOC和MOC-HER相比，成功率显著提高。
summary_zh: 分层强化学习(HRL)框架，如Option-Critic (OC)和多步更新Option-Critic (MOC)，在学习可重用选项方面取得了显著进展。然而，这些方法在具有稀疏奖励的多目标环境中表现不佳，此类环境中动作必须与时间上遥远的结果相关联。为解决这一局限性，我们首先提出MOC-HER，将追溯经验回放(HER)机制集成到MOC框架中。通过从已实现的结果中重新标记目标，MOC-HER能够解决原始MOC难以处理的稀疏奖励环境。然而，这种方法不足以应对物体操控任务，因为此类任务的奖励取决于物体是否到达目标，而并非取决于智能体的直接交互。这使得HRL智能体极难发现如何与这些物体进行交互。为了克服这个问题，我们引入了双目标追溯经验回放(2HER)，这是一个新颖的扩展，它创建了两组虚拟目标。除了基于物体的最终状态重新标记目标（标准HER）外，2HER还从操作臂末端执行器的位置生成目标，奖励智能体与物体交互以及完成任务的行为。在机器人操控环境中的实验结果表明，MOC-2HER的成功率高达90%，而MOC和MOC-HER的成功率均不到11%。这些结果突显了我们的双目标重标记策略在稀疏奖励、多目标任务中的有效性。

title: Humanoid Hanoi: Investigating Shared Whole-Body Control for Skill-Based Box Rearrangement
summary: We investigate a skill-based framework for humanoid box rearrangement that enables long-horizon execution by sequencing reusable skills at the task level. In our architecture, all skills execute through a shared, task-agnostic whole-body controller (WBC), providing a consistent closed-loop interface for skill composition, in contrast to non-shared designs that use separate low-level controllers per skill. We find that naively reusing the same pretrained WBC can reduce robustness over long horizons, as new skills and their compositions induce shifted state and command distributions. We address this with a simple data aggregation procedure that augments shared-WBC training with rollouts from closed-loop skill execution under domain randomization. To evaluate the approach, we introduce \emph{Humanoid Hanoi}, a long-horizon Tower-of-Hanoi box rearrangement benchmark, and report results in simulation and on the Digit V3 humanoid robot, demonstrating fully autonomous rearrangement over extended horizons and quantifying the benefits of the shared-WBC approach over non-shared baselines.
tldr: This paper presents a skill-based framework for humanoid box rearrangement using a shared whole-body controller (WBC) and introduces a data aggregation procedure with domain randomization to improve robustness over long horizons, evaluated on a challenging Tower-of-Hanoi benchmark in simulation and on a real robot.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个基于技能的人形机器人箱子重排框架，该框架使用共享的全身控制器（WBC），并引入了带有域随机化的数据聚合程序，以提高长时域的鲁棒性。该方法在一个具有挑战性的汉诺塔基准上进行了评估，包括仿真和真实机器人测试。
summary_zh: 我们研究了一种基于技能的人形机器人箱体重排框架，该框架通过在任务级别对可复用技能进行排序来实现长时程执行。在我们的架构中，所有技能都通过一个共享的、与任务无关的全身控制器（WBC）执行，为技能组合提供了一致的闭环接口，这与每个技能使用单独的底层控制器的非共享设计形成对比。我们发现，简单地复用相同的预训练WBC可能会降低长时程的鲁棒性，因为新的技能及其组合会引起状态和指令分布的偏移。我们通过一个简单的数据聚合过程来解决这个问题，该过程使用在领域随机化下的闭环技能执行的rollouts来增强共享WBC的训练。为了评估该方法，我们引入了\emph{人形机器人汉诺塔}，这是一个长时程的汉诺塔箱体重排基准，并报告了在仿真和Digit V3人形机器人上的结果，展示了在扩展时程上的完全自主重排，并量化了共享WBC方法相对于非共享基线的优势。

title: REDSearcher: A Scalable and Cost-Efficient Framework for Long-Horizon Search Agents
summary: Large language models are transitioning from generalpurpose knowledge engines to realworld problem solvers, yet optimizing them for deep search tasks remains challenging. The central bottleneck lies in the extreme sparsity of highquality search trajectories and reward signals, arising from the difficulty of scalable longhorizon task construction and the high cost of interactionheavy rollouts involving external tool calls. To address these challenges, we propose REDSearcher, a unified framework that codesigns complex task synthesis, midtraining, and posttraining for scalable searchagent optimization. Specifically, REDSearcher introduces the following improvements: (1) We frame task synthesis as a dualconstrained optimization, where task difficulty is precisely governed by graph topology and evidence dispersion, allowing scalable generation of complex, highquality tasks. (2) We introduce toolaugmented queries to encourage proactive tool use rather than passive recall.(3) During midtraining, we strengthen core atomic capabilities knowledge, planning, and function calling substantially reducing the cost of collecting highquality trajectories for downstream training. (4) We build a local simulated environment that enables rapid, lowcost algorithmic iteration for reinforcement learning experiments. Across both textonly and multimodal searchagent benchmarks, our approach achieves stateoftheart performance. To facilitate future research on longhorizon search agents, we will release 10K highquality complex text search trajectories, 5K multimodal trajectories and 1K text RL query set, and together with code and model checkpoints.
tldr: REDSearcher is a framework that addresses the challenges of training LLMs for deep search tasks by codesigning task synthesis, midtraining, and posttraining, resulting in state-of-the-art performance on text and multimodal benchmarks, with datasets and code to be released.
tldr_zh: REDSearcher是一个框架，通过协同设计任务合成、中期训练和后期训练，解决了训练LLM进行深度搜索任务的挑战，并在文本和多模态基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，并发布数据集和代码。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型正从通用知识引擎向现实世界问题求解器转型，但针对深度搜索任务对其进行优化仍然充满挑战。 主要瓶颈在于高质量搜索轨迹和奖励信号的极端稀疏性，这是由于可扩展的长程任务构建的困难以及涉及外部工具调用的交互密集型推演的高成本所致。 为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了REDSearcher，一个统一的框架，它共同设计了复杂的任务合成、中期训练和后期训练，以实现可扩展的搜索代理优化。 具体而言，REDSearcher引入了以下改进：（1）我们将任务合成构建为一个双约束优化问题，其中任务难度由图拓扑和证据分散精确控制，从而能够可扩展地生成复杂、高质量的任务。（2）我们引入了工具增强查询，以鼓励主动工具使用，而不是被动回忆。（3）在中期训练期间，我们大幅加强了核心原子能力，包括知识、规划和函数调用，从而显著降低了收集用于下游训练的高质量轨迹的成本。（4）我们构建了一个本地模拟环境，该环境能够实现快速、低成本的算法迭代，用于强化学习实验。 在仅文本和多模态搜索代理基准测试中，我们的方法都取得了最先进的性能。 为了促进未来对长程搜索代理的研究，我们将发布1万条高质量的复杂文本搜索轨迹、5千条多模态轨迹和1千条文本强化学习查询集，以及代码和模型检查点。

title: Text Before Vision: Staged Knowledge Injection Matters for Agentic RLVR in Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Understanding
summary: Multimodal reasoning for ultra-high-resolution (UHR) remote sensing (RS) is usually bottlenecked by visual evidence acquisition: the model necessitates localizing tiny task-relevant regions in massive pixel spaces. While Agentic Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) using zoom-in tools offers a path forward, we find that standard reinforcement learning struggles to navigate these vast visual spaces without structured domain priors. In this paper, we investigate the interplay between post-training paradigms: comparing Cold-start Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), RLVR, and Agentic RLVR on the UHR RS benchmark.Our controlled studies yield a counter-intuitive finding: high-quality Earth-science text-only QA is a primary driver of UHR visual reasoning gains. Despite lacking images, domain-specific text injects the concepts, mechanistic explanations, and decision rules necessary to guide visual evidence retrieval.Based on this, we propose a staged knowledge injection recipe: (1) cold-starting with scalable, knowledge-graph-verified Earth-science text QA to instill reasoning structures;and (2) "pre-warming" on the same hard UHR image-text examples during SFT to stabilize and amplify subsequent tool-based RL. This approach achieves a 60.40% Pass@1 on XLRS-Bench, significantly outperforming larger general purpose models (e.g., GPT-5.2, Gemini 3.0 Pro, Intern-S1) and establishing a new state-of-the-art.
tldr: The paper proposes a staged knowledge injection recipe for Agentic RLVR in ultra-high-resolution remote sensing understanding, demonstrating that pre-training on text-only QA improves visual reasoning and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the XLRS-Bench.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于超高分辨率遥感理解中 Agentic RLVR 的分阶段知识注入方法。研究表明，在纯文本 QA 上进行预训练能够提升视觉推理能力，并在 XLRS-Bench 上实现了当前最佳性能。
summary_zh: 用于超高分辨率（UHR）遥感（RS）的多模态推理通常受限于视觉证据获取：模型需要在海量像素空间中定位微小的任务相关区域。虽然使用放大工具的具有可验证奖励的智能体强化学习（RLVR）提供了一条前进的道路，但我们发现，在没有结构化领域先验知识的情况下，标准强化学习难以在这些广阔的视觉空间中导航。在本文中，我们研究了后训练范式之间的相互作用：比较冷启动有监督微调（SFT）、RLVR以及在UHR RS基准上的智能体RLVR。我们控制的研究得出了一个违反直觉的发现：高质量的仅限地球科学文本的问答是UHR视觉推理收益的主要驱动力。尽管缺乏图像，但特定领域的文本注入了引导视觉证据检索所需的概念、机制解释和决策规则。基于此，我们提出了一种分阶段的知识注入方案：（1）利用可扩展的、经过知识图谱验证的地球科学文本问答进行冷启动，以灌输推理结构；（2）在SFT期间，在相同的困难UHR图像-文本示例上进行“预热”，以稳定和放大后续基于工具的RL。这种方法在XLRS-Bench上实现了60.40%的Pass@1，显著优于更大的通用模型（例如，GPT-5.2、Gemini 3.0 Pro、Intern-S1），并建立了一个新的最先进水平。

title: Deep Dense Exploration for LLM Reinforcement Learning via Pivot-Driven Resampling
summary: Effective exploration is a key challenge in reinforcement learning for large language models: discovering high-quality trajectories within a limited sampling budget from the vast natural language sequence space. Existing methods face notable limitations: GRPO samples exclusively from the root, saturating high-probability trajectories while leaving deep, error-prone states under-explored. Tree-based methods blindly disperse budgets across trivial or unrecoverable states, causing sampling dilution that fails to uncover rare correct suffixes and destabilizes local baselines. To address this, we propose Deep Dense Exploration (DDE), a strategy that focuses exploration on $\textit{pivots}$-deep, recoverable states within unsuccessful trajectories. We instantiate DDE with DEEP-GRPO, which introduces three key innovations: (1) a lightweight data-driven utility function that automatically balances recoverability and depth bias to identify pivot states; (2) local dense resampling at each pivot to increase the probability of discovering correct subsequent trajectories; and (3) a dual-stream optimization objective that decouples global policy learning from local corrective updates. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms GRPO, tree-based methods, and other strong baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces Deep Dense Exploration (DDE) for reinforcement learning with LLMs, addressing exploration limitations in GRPO and tree-based methods by focusing on deep, recoverable states and dense resampling. Experiments on mathematical reasoning show improved performance over baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Dense Exploration (DDE) 的大型语言模型强化学习方法，通过关注深度、可恢复状态和密集重采样，解决了GRPO和基于树的方法中的探索限制。在数学推理实验中，该方法优于其他基线。
summary_zh: 有效探索是大型语言模型强化学习中的一个关键挑战：在有限的采样预算内，从广阔的自然语言序列空间中发现高质量的轨迹。现有方法面临显著的局限性：GRPO 仅从根节点进行采样，使高概率轨迹饱和，同时留下深度、容易出错的状态未被充分探索。基于树的方法盲目地将预算分散到无关紧要或无法挽回的状态，导致采样稀释，无法发现罕见的正确后缀，并破坏局部基线的稳定性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种深度密集探索（DDE）策略，该策略专注于探索$\textit{枢轴}$——位于不成功轨迹中的深度、可恢复状态。我们用 DEEP-GRPO 实例化 DDE，它引入了三个关键创新：（1）一种轻量级的数据驱动效用函数，自动平衡可恢复性和深度偏差以识别枢轴状态；（2）在每个枢轴进行局部密集重采样，以增加发现后续正确轨迹的概率；以及（3）一个双流优化目标，将全局策略学习与局部修正更新解耦。在数学推理基准测试上的实验表明，我们的方法始终优于 GRPO、基于树的方法和其他强大的基线。

title: ForesightSafety Bench: A Frontier Risk Evaluation and Governance Framework towards Safe AI
summary: Rapidly evolving AI exhibits increasingly strong autonomy and goal-directed capabilities, accompanied by derivative systemic risks that are more unpredictable, difficult to control, and potentially irreversible. However, current AI safety evaluation systems suffer from critical limitations such as restricted risk dimensions and failed frontier risk detection. The lagging safety benchmarks and alignment technologies can hardly address the complex challenges posed by cutting-edge AI models. To bridge this gap, we propose the "ForesightSafety Bench" AI Safety Evaluation Framework, beginning with 7 major Fundamental Safety pillars and progressively extends to advanced Embodied AI Safety, AI4Science Safety, Social and Environmental AI risks, Catastrophic and Existential Risks, as well as 8 critical industrial safety domains, forming a total of 94 refined risk dimensions. To date, the benchmark has accumulated tens of thousands of structured risk data points and assessment results, establishing a widely encompassing, hierarchically clear, and dynamically evolving AI safety evaluation framework. Based on this benchmark, we conduct systematic evaluation and in-depth analysis of over twenty mainstream advanced large models, identifying key risk patterns and their capability boundaries. The safety capability evaluation results reveals the widespread safety vulnerabilities of frontier AI across multiple pillars, particularly focusing on Risky Agentic Autonomy, AI4Science Safety, Embodied AI Safety, Social AI Safety and Catastrophic and Existential Risks. Our benchmark is released at https://github.com/Beijing-AISI/ForesightSafety-Bench. The project website is available at https://foresightsafety-bench.beijing-aisi.ac.cn/.
tldr: The paper introduces ForesightSafety Bench, a comprehensive AI safety evaluation framework with 94 risk dimensions, systematically evaluating large models and identifying widespread safety vulnerabilities, particularly in risky agentic autonomy and existential risks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ForesightSafety Bench，一个全面的AI安全评估框架，包含94个风险维度，系统地评估大型模型，并识别出广泛的安全漏洞，尤其是在危险的能动自主性和存在风险方面。
summary_zh: 快速发展的人工智能展现出日益增强的自主性和目标导向能力，同时也伴随着衍生性的系统性风险，这些风险更加不可预测、难以控制，并且可能具有不可逆性。然而，当前的人工智能安全评估体系存在关键局限性，例如风险维度受限以及前沿风险检测失败。滞后的安全基准和对齐技术难以应对尖端人工智能模型带来的复杂挑战。为弥合这一差距，我们提出了“前瞻安全基准”人工智能安全评估框架，从7大基础安全支柱出发，逐步扩展到高级具身人工智能安全、人工智能辅助科学安全、社会和环境人工智能风险、灾难性和生存性风险，以及8个关键工业安全领域，共形成94个细化的风险维度。迄今为止，该基准已积累数万个结构化的风险数据点和评估结果，建立了一个广泛涵盖、层次清晰且动态发展的人工智能安全评估框架。基于该基准，我们对二十多个主流先进大型模型进行了系统评估和深入分析，识别出关键的风险模式及其能力边界。安全能力评估结果揭示了前沿人工智能在多个支柱上的普遍安全漏洞，尤其集中在风险自主代理、人工智能辅助科学安全、具身人工智能安全、社会人工智能安全以及灾难性和生存性风险方面。我们的基准已在https://github.com/Beijing-AISI/ForesightSafety-Bench上发布。项目网站地址为https://foresightsafety-bench.beijing-aisi.ac.cn/。

title: DenseMLLM: Standard Multimodal LLMs are Intrinsic Dense Predictors
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated exceptional capabilities in high-level visual understanding. However, extending these models to fine-grained dense prediction tasks, such as semantic segmentation and depth estimation, typically necessitates the incorporation of complex, task-specific decoders and other customizations. This architectural fragmentation increases model complexity and deviates from the generalist design of MLLMs, ultimately limiting their practicality. In this work, we challenge this paradigm by accommodating standard MLLMs to perform dense predictions without requiring additional task-specific decoders. The proposed model is called DenseMLLM, grounded in the standard architecture with a novel vision token supervision strategy for multiple labels and tasks. Despite its minimalist design, our model achieves highly competitive performance across a wide range of dense prediction and vision-language benchmarks, demonstrating that a standard, general-purpose MLLM can effectively support dense perception without architectural specialization.
tldr: The paper presents DenseMLLM, a method that enables standard multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perform dense prediction tasks without task-specific decoders, achieving competitive performance across various benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了DenseMLLM，一种使标准多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）无需特定任务解码器即可执行密集预测任务的方法，并在各种基准测试中实现了有竞争力的性能。
summary_zh: 多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）在高层次视觉理解方面展现出卓越的能力。然而，将这些模型扩展到细粒度的密集预测任务，例如语义分割和深度估计，通常需要结合复杂的、特定于任务的解码器和其他定制化设计。这种架构上的碎片化增加了模型的复杂性，并偏离了MLLM的通用设计理念，最终限制了它们的实用性。在这项工作中，我们挑战了这种范式，通过使标准MLLM能够执行密集预测，而无需额外的特定于任务的解码器。所提出的模型名为DenseMLLM，基于标准架构，并采用了一种新颖的、针对多标签和任务的视觉令牌监督策略。尽管设计极简，我们的模型在一系列密集预测和视觉-语言基准测试中都取得了极具竞争力的性能，表明标准的、通用的MLLM可以在没有架构专门化的情况下有效地支持密集感知。

title: GUI-GENESIS: Automated Synthesis of Efficient Environments with Verifiable Rewards for GUI Agent Post-Training
summary: Post-training GUI agents in interactive environments is critical for developing generalization and long-horizon planning capabilities. However, training on real-world applications is hindered by high latency, poor reproducibility, and unverifiable rewards relying on noisy visual proxies. To address the limitations, we present GUI-GENESIS, the first framework to automatically synthesize efficient GUI training environments with verifiable rewards. GUI-GENESIS reconstructs real-world applications into lightweight web environments using multimodal code models and equips them with code-native rewards, executable assertions that provide deterministic reward signals and eliminate visual estimation noise. Extensive experiments show that GUI-GENESIS reduces environment latency by 10 times and costs by over $28,000 per epoch compared to training on real applications. Notably, agents trained with GUI-GENESIS outperform the base model by 14.54% and even real-world RL baselines by 3.27% on held-out real-world tasks. Finally, we observe that models can synthesize environments they cannot yet solve, highlighting a pathway for self-improving agents.
tldr: GUI-GENESIS is a framework that synthesizes efficient GUI training environments with verifiable rewards for post-training GUI agents, achieving significant performance improvements and cost reductions compared to real-world training.
tldr_zh: GUI-GENESIS是一个框架，用于合成具有可验证奖励的高效GUI训练环境，用于GUI智能体的后训练，与真实环境训练相比，实现了显著的性能提升和成本降低。
summary_zh: 在交互环境中对训练后的GUI智能体进行训练对于发展泛化和长期规划能力至关重要。然而，在真实世界应用程序上进行训练受到高延迟、低可复现性和依赖于嘈杂视觉代理的不可验证奖励的阻碍。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了GUI-GENESIS，这是第一个能够自动合成具有可验证奖励的高效GUI训练环境的框架。GUI-GENESIS使用多模态代码模型将真实世界应用程序重构为轻量级的Web环境，并为其配备代码原生奖励，即可执行断言，其提供确定性的奖励信号并消除视觉估计噪声。大量的实验表明，与在真实应用程序上训练相比，GUI-GENESIS将环境延迟降低了10倍，并将每个epoch的成本降低了28,000美元以上。值得注意的是，使用GUI-GENESIS训练的智能体在held-out的真实世界任务上，性能比基础模型提高了14.54%，甚至比真实世界的RL基线方法提高了3.27%。最后，我们观察到模型可以合成它们尚未能解决的环境，这突出了智能体自我提升的途径。

title: Plan-MCTS: Plan Exploration for Action Exploitation in Web Navigation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have empowered autonomous agents to handle complex web navigation tasks. While recent studies integrate tree search to enhance long-horizon reasoning, applying these algorithms in web navigation faces two critical challenges: sparse valid paths that lead to inefficient exploration, and a noisy context that dilutes accurate state perception. To address this, we introduce Plan-MCTS, a framework that reformulates web navigation by shifting exploration to a semantic Plan Space. By decoupling strategic planning from execution grounding, it transforms sparse action space into a Dense Plan Tree for efficient exploration, and distills noisy contexts into an Abstracted Semantic History for precise state awareness. To ensure efficiency and robustness, Plan-MCTS incorporates a Dual-Gating Reward to strictly validate both physical executability and strategic alignment and Structural Refinement for on-policy repair of failed subplans. Extensive experiments on WebArena demonstrate that Plan-MCTS achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing current approaches with higher task effectiveness and search efficiency.
tldr: The paper introduces Plan-MCTS, a novel framework for web navigation that leverages LLMs and tree search by planning in a semantic plan space to address the challenges of sparse valid paths and noisy contexts. It achieves SOTA performance on WebArena.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Plan-MCTS，一种用于网络导航的新框架，它利用LLM和树搜索，通过在语义计划空间中进行规划，以解决稀疏有效路径和嘈杂上下文的挑战。 它在WebArena上实现了SOTA性能。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已经赋能自主智能体处理复杂的网络导航任务。尽管近期的研究整合了树搜索以增强长程推理能力，但在网络导航中应用这些算法面临两个关键挑战：导致低效探索的稀疏有效路径，以及稀释精确状态感知的嘈杂上下文。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了Plan-MCTS，一个通过将探索转移到语义计划空间来重新定义网络导航的框架。通过将战略规划与执行落地解耦，它将稀疏动作空间转化为密集的计划树，从而实现高效探索，并将嘈杂的上下文提炼成抽象语义历史，从而实现精确的状态感知。 为了确保效率和鲁棒性，Plan-MCTS结合了双门控奖励，以严格验证物理可执行性和战略对齐，以及结构精炼，用于在线修复失败的子计划。 在WebArena上的大量实验表明，Plan-MCTS实现了最先进的性能，以更高的任务有效性和搜索效率超越了当前的方法。

title: Choosing How to Remember: Adaptive Memory Structures for LLM Agents
summary: Memory is critical for enabling large language model (LLM) based agents to maintain coherent behavior over long-horizon interactions. However, existing agent memory systems suffer from two key gaps: they rely on a one-size-fits-all memory structure and do not model memory structure selection as a context-adaptive decision, limiting their ability to handle heterogeneous interaction patterns and resulting in suboptimal performance. We propose a unified framework, FluxMem, that enables adaptive memory organization for LLM agents. Our framework equips agents with multiple complementary memory structures. It explicitly learns to select among these structures based on interaction-level features, using offline supervision derived from downstream response quality and memory utilization. To support robust long-horizon memory evolution, we further introduce a three-level memory hierarchy and a Beta Mixture Model-based probabilistic gate for distribution-aware memory fusion, replacing brittle similarity thresholds. Experiments on two long-horizon benchmarks, PERSONAMEM and LoCoMo, demonstrate that our method achieves average improvements of 9.18% and 6.14%.
tldr: The paper introduces FluxMem, a framework for LLM agents that adaptively selects and fuses different memory structures based on interaction context to improve performance on long-horizon tasks, achieving significant gains on two benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FluxMem，一个为LLM代理设计的框架，它能根据互动上下文自适应地选择和融合不同的记忆结构，以提高在长程任务中的表现，并在两个基准测试中取得了显著的提升。
summary_zh: 内存对于支持基于大型语言模型（LLM）的智能体在长期交互中保持连贯行为至关重要。然而，现有的智能体内存系统存在两个关键缺陷：它们依赖于一刀切的内存结构，并且没有将内存结构选择建模为情境自适应决策，这限制了它们处理异构交互模式的能力，并导致次优性能。我们提出了一个统一的框架 FluxMem，它使得 LLM 智能体能够进行自适应的内存组织。我们的框架为智能体配备了多种互补的内存结构。它显式地学习基于交互层面的特征在这些结构中进行选择，使用来自下游响应质量和内存利用率的离线监督信息。为了支持鲁棒的长期内存演化，我们进一步引入了一个三级内存层级结构和一个基于 Beta 混合模型的概率门，用于实现分布感知的内存融合，取代了脆弱的相似度阈值。在两个长期基准测试 PERSONAMEM 和 LoCoMo 上的实验表明，我们的方法实现了平均 9.18% 和 6.14% 的性能提升。

title: Experiential Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning has become the central approach for language models (LMs) to learn from environmental reward or feedback. In practice, the environmental feedback is usually sparse and delayed. Learning from such signals is challenging, as LMs must implicitly infer how observed failures should translate into behavioral changes for future iterations. We introduce Experiential Reinforcement Learning (ERL), a training paradigm that embeds an explicit experience-reflection-consolidation loop into the reinforcement learning process. Given a task, the model generates an initial attempt, receives environmental feedback, and produces a reflection that guides a refined second attempt, whose success is reinforced and internalized into the base policy. This process converts feedback into structured behavioral revision, improving exploration and stabilizing optimization while preserving gains at deployment without additional inference cost. Across sparse-reward control environments and agentic reasoning benchmarks, ERL consistently improves learning efficiency and final performance over strong reinforcement learning baselines, achieving gains of up to +81% in complex multi-step environments and up to +11% in tool-using reasoning tasks. These results suggest that integrating explicit self-reflection into policy training provides a practical mechanism for transforming feedback into durable behavioral improvement.
tldr: The paper introduces Experiential Reinforcement Learning (ERL), a method that explicitly incorporates experience-reflection-consolidation into the RL loop for improved learning efficiency and performance, especially in sparse-reward and complex reasoning tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了经验强化学习（ERL），一种将经验-反思-巩固循环显式地整合到强化学习中的方法，以提高学习效率和性能，尤其是在稀疏奖励和复杂推理任务中。
summary_zh: 强化学习已成为语言模型（LMs）从环境奖励或反馈中学习的核心方法。在实践中，环境反馈通常是稀疏且延迟的。从此类信号中学习具有挑战性，因为 LMs 必须隐式地推断所观察到的失败应如何转化为未来迭代中的行为改变。我们引入了经验强化学习（ERL），这是一种将显式的经验-反思-巩固循环嵌入到强化学习过程中的训练范式。给定一项任务，模型生成一个初始尝试，接收环境反馈，并产生指导一个改进的第二次尝试的反思，其成功会被强化并内化到基础策略中。这个过程将反馈转化为结构化的行为修订，在部署时无需额外的推理成本，从而改善了探索和稳定了优化，同时保留了收益。在稀疏奖励控制环境和具身推理基准测试中，ERL 持续改进了学习效率和最终性能，超越了强大的强化学习基线，在复杂的多步环境中实现了高达 +81% 的收益，在使用工具的推理任务中实现了高达 +11% 的收益。 这些结果表明，将显式的自我反思集成到策略训练中，为将反馈转化为持久的行为改进提供了一种实用的机制。

title: From Pixels to Policies: Reinforcing Spatial Reasoning in Language Models for Content-Aware Layout Design
summary: We introduce LaySPA, a reinforcement learning framework that equips large language models (LLMs) with explicit and interpretable spatial reasoning for content-aware graphic layout design. LaySPA addresses two key challenges: LLMs' limited spatial reasoning and the lack of opacity in design decision making. Instead of operating at the pixel level, we reformulate layout design as a policy learning problem over a structured textual spatial environment that explicitly encodes canvas geometry, element attributes, and inter-element relationships. LaySPA produces dual-level outputs comprising interpretable reasoning traces and structured layout specifications, enabling transparent and controllable design decision making. Layout design policy is optimized via a multi-objective spatial critique that decomposes layout quality into geometric validity, relational coherence, and aesthetic consistency, and is trained using relative group optimization to stabilize learning in open-ended design spaces. Experiments demonstrate that LaySPA improves structural validity and visual quality, outperforming larger proprietary LLMs and achieving performance comparable to specialized SOTA layout generators while requiring fewer annotated samples and reduced latency.
tldr: The paper introduces LaySPA, a reinforcement learning framework that uses LLMs for content-aware layout design by formalizing it as a policy learning problem over a structured textual spatial environment benefiting from interpretable reasoning and improved spatial understanding.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为LaySPA的强化学习框架，该框架利用大型语言模型进行内容感知的布局设计，通过将布局设计形式化为结构化文本空间环境上的策略学习问题，从而受益于可解释的推理和改进的空间理解。
summary_zh: 我们引入LaySPA，一种强化学习框架，赋予大型语言模型（LLMs）显式且可解释的空间推理能力，用于内容感知的图形布局设计。LaySPA解决了两个关键挑战：LLMs有限的空间推理能力以及设计决策缺乏透明度。不同于在像素级别操作，我们将布局设计重新定义为在结构化的文本空间环境上的策略学习问题，该环境显式地编码了画布几何、元素属性和元素间的关系。LaySPA产生双层输出，包括可解释的推理轨迹和结构化的布局规范，从而实现透明且可控的设计决策。布局设计策略通过多目标空间评估进行优化，该评估将布局质量分解为几何有效性、关系一致性和美学一致性，并使用相对群体优化进行训练，以稳定开放式设计空间中的学习。实验表明，LaySPA提高了结构有效性和视觉质量，优于更大的专有LLMs，并在需要更少的标注样本和降低延迟的同时，实现了与专门的SOTA布局生成器相当的性能。

title: EgoSound: Benchmarking Sound Understanding in Egocentric Videos
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently achieved remarkable progress in vision-language understanding. Yet, human perception is inherently multisensory, integrating sight, sound, and motion to reason about the world. Among these modalities, sound provides indispensable cues about spatial layout, off-screen events, and causal interactions, particularly in egocentric settings where auditory and visual signals are tightly coupled. To this end, we introduce EgoSound, the first benchmark designed to systematically evaluate egocentric sound understanding in MLLMs. EgoSound unifies data from Ego4D and EgoBlind, encompassing both sighted and sound-dependent experiences. It defines a seven-task taxonomy spanning intrinsic sound perception, spatial localization, causal inference, and cross-modal reasoning. Constructed through a multi-stage auto-generative pipeline, EgoSound contains 7315 validated QA pairs across 900 videos. Comprehensive experiments on nine state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal that current models exhibit emerging auditory reasoning abilities but remain limited in fine-grained spatial and causal understanding. EgoSound establishes a challenging foundation for advancing multisensory egocentric intelligence, bridging the gap between seeing and truly hearing the world.
tldr: The paper introduces EgoSound, a new benchmark for evaluating sound understanding in egocentric videos within MLLMs, highlighting the need to bridge the gap between visual and auditory reasoning, particularly regarding spatial and causal understanding. It identifies limitations in state-of-the-art models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了EgoSound，一个用于评估多模态大语言模型在以自我为中心的视频中对声音理解的新基准。该基准突出了弥合视觉和听觉推理之间差距的需求，特别是在空间和因果理解方面。它还指出了当前先进模型的局限性。
summary_zh: 多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)最近在视觉-语言理解方面取得了显著进展。然而，人类的感知本质上是多感官的，整合了视觉、听觉和运动来推理世界。在这些模态中，声音提供了关于空间布局、屏幕外事件和因果交互不可或缺的线索，尤其是在以自我为中心的场景中，听觉和视觉信号紧密耦合。为此，我们推出了EgoSound，这是第一个旨在系统评估 MLLM 中以自我为中心的音频理解的基准。EgoSound整合了来自Ego4D和EgoBlind的数据，涵盖了有视觉的和依赖声音的体验。它定义了一个七个任务的分类体系，涵盖了内在声音感知、空间定位、因果推断和跨模态推理。EgoSound 通过多阶段自动生成流程构建，包含 900 个视频中 7315 个经过验证的 QA 对。对九个最先进的 MLLM 的全面实验表明，当前的模型展现出新兴的听觉推理能力，但在细粒度的空间和因果理解方面仍然有限。EgoSound 为推进多感官以自我为中心的人工智能建立了具有挑战性的基础，弥合了看到和真正听到世界之间的差距。

title: Why Code, Why Now: Learnability, Computability, and the Real Limits of Machine Learning
summary: Code generation has progressed more reliably than reinforcement learning, largely because code has an information structure that makes it learnable. Code provides dense, local, verifiable feedback at every token, whereas most reinforcement learning problems do not. This difference in feedback quality is not binary but graded. We propose a five-level hierarchy of learnability based on information structure and argue that the ceiling on ML progress depends less on model size than on whether a task is learnable at all. The hierarchy rests on a formal distinction among three properties of computational problems (expressibility, computability, and learnability). We establish their pairwise relationships, including where implications hold and where they fail, and present a unified template that makes the structural differences explicit. The analysis suggests why supervised learning on code scales predictably while reinforcement learning does not, and why the common assumption that scaling alone will solve remaining ML challenges warrants scrutiny.
tldr: This paper proposes a hierarchy of learnability based on information structure, arguing that task learnability, not just model size, limits ML progress. It analyzes the differences between supervised learning on code and reinforcement learning, calling into question the assumption that scaling alone will solve ML challenges.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个基于信息结构的可学习性等级，认为任务的可学习性，而不仅仅是模型大小，限制了机器学习的进展。 它分析了代码上的监督学习和强化学习之间的差异，质疑了仅靠扩展就能解决机器学习挑战的假设。
summary_zh: 代码生成比强化学习的进展更为可靠，这主要归功于代码具有使其可学习的信息结构。代码在每个token处都提供了密集、局部、可验证的反馈，而大多数强化学习问题则不然。这种反馈质量的差异不是二元的，而是分级的。我们提出一个基于信息结构的五级可学习性层级，并认为机器学习进展的天花板更多取决于任务是否可学习，而不是模型大小。此层级建立在计算问题的三个属性（可表达性、可计算性和可学习性）的正式区分之上。我们建立了它们之间的成对关系，包括蕴涵成立和不成立的地方，并提出了一个统一的模板，使结构性差异显式化。该分析表明，为什么对代码进行监督学习能够可预测地扩展，而强化学习则不能，以及为什么仅靠扩展就能解决剩余的机器学习挑战这一常见假设值得仔细审查。

title: GRAIL: Goal Recognition Alignment through Imitation Learning
summary: Understanding an agent's goals from its behavior is fundamental to aligning AI systems with human intentions. Existing goal recognition methods typically rely on an optimal goal-oriented policy representation, which may differ from the actor's true behavior and hinder the accurate recognition of their goal. To address this gap, this paper introduces Goal Recognition Alignment through Imitation Learning (GRAIL), which leverages imitation learning and inverse reinforcement learning to learn one goal-directed policy for each candidate goal directly from (potentially suboptimal) demonstration trajectories. By scoring an observed partial trajectory with each learned goal-directed policy in a single forward pass, GRAIL retains the one-shot inference capability of classical goal recognition while leveraging learned policies that can capture suboptimal and systematically biased behavior. Across the evaluated domains, GRAIL increases the F1-score by more than 0.5 under systematically biased optimal behavior, achieves gains of approximately 0.1-0.3 under suboptimal behavior, and yields improvements of up to 0.4 under noisy optimal trajectories, while remaining competitive in fully optimal settings. This work contributes toward scalable and robust models for interpreting agent goals in uncertain environments.
tldr: The paper introduces GRAIL, a novel goal recognition method using imitation learning to infer agent goals from potentially suboptimal behaviors, outperforming existing methods in various scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GRAIL，一种新颖的目标识别方法，它利用模仿学习从可能非最优的行为中推断智能体的目标，并在各种场景中优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 通过观察智能体的行为来理解其目标，对于将人工智能系统与人类意图对齐至关重要。现有的目标识别方法通常依赖于优化的、以目标为导向的策略表征，但这可能与行动者的真实行为不同，并阻碍对其目标的准确识别。为了弥补这一差距，本文引入了通过模仿学习实现目标识别对齐的方法（GRAIL），该方法利用模仿学习和逆强化学习，直接从（可能并非最优的）演示轨迹中为每个候选目标学习一个以目标为导向的策略。通过在一次前向传递中，利用每个学习到的以目标为导向的策略对观察到的部分轨迹进行评分，GRAIL保留了经典目标识别的单次推理能力，同时利用学习到的策略捕获次优和系统性偏差的行为。在所评估的领域中，GRAIL在系统性偏差的最优行为下，F1分数提高了0.5以上；在次优行为下，获得了约0.1-0.3的增益；在噪声最优轨迹下，获得了高达0.4的改进，同时在完全最优的情况下保持了竞争力。这项工作有助于开发可扩展且鲁棒的模型，以便在不确定的环境中解释智能体的目标。

title: Learning Part-Aware Dense 3D Feature Field for Generalizable Articulated Object Manipulation
summary: Articulated object manipulation is essential for various real-world robotic tasks, yet generalizing across diverse objects remains a major challenge. A key to generalization lies in understanding functional parts (e.g., door handles and knobs), which indicate where and how to manipulate across diverse object categories and shapes. Previous works attempted to achieve generalization by introducing foundation features, while these features are mostly 2D-based and do not specifically consider functional parts. When lifting these 2D features to geometry-profound 3D space, challenges arise, such as long runtimes, multi-view inconsistencies, and low spatial resolution with insufficient geometric information. To address these issues, we propose Part-Aware 3D Feature Field (PA3FF), a novel dense 3D feature with part awareness for generalizable articulated object manipulation. PA3FF is trained by 3D part proposals from a large-scale labeled dataset, via a contrastive learning formulation. Given point clouds as input, PA3FF predicts a continuous 3D feature field in a feedforward manner, where the distance between point features reflects the proximity of functional parts: points with similar features are more likely to belong to the same part. Building on this feature, we introduce the Part-Aware Diffusion Policy (PADP), an imitation learning framework aimed at enhancing sample efficiency and generalization for robotic manipulation. We evaluate PADP on several simulated and real-world tasks, demonstrating that PA3FF consistently outperforms a range of 2D and 3D representations in manipulation scenarios, including CLIP, DINOv2, and Grounded-SAM. Beyond imitation learning, PA3FF enables diverse downstream methods, including correspondence learning and segmentation tasks, making it a versatile foundation for robotic manipulation. Project page: https://pa3ff.github.io
tldr: The paper introduces Part-Aware 3D Feature Field (PA3FF), a novel 3D representation learned via contrastive learning to identify functional parts for generalizable articulated object manipulation, and demonstrates its effectiveness within an imitation learning framework.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Part-Aware 3D Feature Field (PA3FF) 的新型3D表示方法，该方法通过对比学习来识别功能部件, 从而实现可泛化的铰接物体操作。 实验表明，在模仿学习框架中，PA3FF表现出了良好的性能。
summary_zh: 铰接物体操作对于各种现实世界的机器人任务至关重要，但跨多样化物体的泛化仍然是一个主要挑战。泛化的关键在于理解功能部件（例如，门把手和旋钮），这些功能部件指示了跨多样化物体类别和形状的操作位置和方式。以往的研究试图通过引入基础特征来实现泛化，但这些特征大多基于2D，并且没有特别考虑功能部件。当将这些2D特征提升到具有深刻几何意义的3D空间时，会出现诸如运行时间长、多视角不一致以及空间分辨率低且几何信息不足等挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新型的具有部件感知能力的密集3D特征——部件感知3D特征场（PA3FF），用于可泛化的铰接物体操作。PA3FF通过来自大规模标注数据集的3D部件提议进行训练，采用对比学习公式。给定点云作为输入，PA3FF以前馈方式预测连续的3D特征场，其中点特征之间的距离反映了功能部件的接近程度：具有相似特征的点更可能属于同一部件。基于此特征，我们引入了部件感知扩散策略（PADP），这是一个旨在提高机器人操作的样本效率和泛化能力的模仿学习框架。我们在多个模拟和真实世界的任务中评估了PADP，结果表明，PA3FF在操纵场景中始终优于一系列2D和3D表示，包括CLIP、DINOv2和Grounded-SAM。除了模仿学习之外，PA3FF还支持各种下游方法，包括对应关系学习和分割任务，使其成为机器人操作的多功能基础。项目主页：https://pa3ff.github.io

title: It Takes Two to Tango: A Holistic Simulator for Joint Order Scheduling and Multi-Agent Path Finding in Robotic Warehouses
summary: The prevailing paradigm in Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems (RMFS) typically treats order scheduling and multi-agent pathfinding as isolated sub-problems. We argue that this decoupling is a fundamental bottleneck, masking the critical dependencies between high-level dispatching and low-level congestion. Existing simulators fail to bridge this gap, often abstracting away heterogeneous kinematics and stochastic execution failures. We propose WareRover, a holistic simulation platform that enforces a tight coupling between OS and MAPF via a unified, closed-loop optimization interface. Unlike standard benchmarks, WareRover integrates dynamic order streams, physics-aware motion constraints, and non-nominal recovery mechanisms into a single evaluation loop. Experiments reveal that SOTA algorithms often falter under these realistic coupled constraints, demonstrating that WareRover provides a necessary and challenging testbed for robust, next-generation warehouse coordination. The project and video is available at https://hhh-x.github.io/WareRover/.
tldr: The paper introduces WareRover, a holistic simulation platform for robotic warehouses that tightly couples order scheduling and multi-agent pathfinding, revealing limitations of current algorithms under realistic, coupled constraints.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为WareRover的综合仿真平台，用于机器人仓库，该平台紧密结合了订单调度和多智能体路径规划，揭示了当前算法在现实、耦合约束下的局限性。
summary_zh: 机器人移动履行系统（RMFS）中，主流范式通常将订单调度和多智能体路径规划视为孤立的子问题。我们认为这种解耦是一个根本性的瓶颈，掩盖了高层分派和底层拥塞之间的关键依赖关系。现有的仿真器未能弥合这一差距，通常抽象掉了异构运动学和随机执行失败。我们提出了WareRover，一个整体仿真平台，通过统一的、闭环优化接口，强化了OS和MAPF之间的紧密耦合。与标准基准不同，WareRover将动态订单流、具有物理感知的运动约束和非标恢复机制集成到单个评估循环中。实验表明，SOTA算法在这些真实的耦合约束下经常失灵，证明WareRover为鲁棒的、下一代仓库协调提供了一个必要且具有挑战性的测试平台。该项目和视频可在https://hhh-x.github.io/WareRover/上找到。

title: High-fidelity 3D reconstruction for planetary exploration
summary: Planetary exploration increasingly relies on autonomous robotic systems capable of perceiving, interpreting, and reconstructing their surroundings in the absence of global positioning or real-time communication with Earth. Rovers operating on planetary surfaces must navigate under sever environmental constraints, limited visual redundancy, and communication delays, making onboard spatial awareness and visual localization key components for mission success. Traditional techniques based on Structure-from-Motion (SfM) and Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) provide geometric consistency but struggle to capture radiometric detail or to scale efficiently in unstructured, low-texture terrains typical of extraterrestrial environments. This work explores the integration of radiance field-based methods - specifically Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and Gaussian Splatting - into a unified, automated environment reconstruction pipeline for planetary robotics. Our system combines the Nerfstudio and COLMAP frameworks with a ROS2-compatible workflow capable of processing raw rover data directly from rosbag recordings. This approach enables the generation of dense, photorealistic, and metrically consistent 3D representations from minimal visual input, supporting improved perception and planning for autonomous systems operating in planetary-like conditions. The resulting pipeline established a foundation for future research in radiance field-based mapping, bridging the gap between geometric and neural representations in planetary exploration.
tldr: This paper explores using Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and Gaussian Splatting for high-fidelity 3D reconstruction in planetary exploration, offering a unified pipeline for processing rover data and generating photorealistic maps from minimal visual input.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用神经辐射场（NeRF）和高斯溅射进行行星探测中的高保真3D重建，提供了一种统一的流程来处理漫游车数据，并从最少的视觉输入生成逼真的地图。
summary_zh: 行星探测越来越依赖于自主机器人系统，这些系统能够在缺乏全球定位或与地球实时通信的情况下感知、解释和重建周围环境。在行星表面运行的漫游车必须在严酷的环境约束、有限的视觉冗余和通信延迟下导航，这使得机载空间感知和视觉定位成为任务成功的关键组成部分。基于运动结构恢复（SfM）和同时定位与地图构建（SLAM）的传统技术能够提供几何一致性，但在捕获辐射度细节或在非结构化、低纹理的典型地外环境中高效扩展方面存在困难。本研究探索了将基于辐射场的方法——特别是神经辐射场（NeRF）和高斯溅射——集成到用于行星机器人的统一、自动化环境重建流程中。我们的系统将Nerfstudio和COLMAP框架与兼容 ROS2 的工作流程相结合，能够直接从 rosbag 录制文件处理原始漫游车数据。这种方法能够从最少的视觉输入中生成密集的、照片级真实的且在度量上一致的 3D 表示，从而支持在类行星条件下运行的自主系统改进感知和规划。由此产生的流程为未来基于辐射场的地图构建研究奠定了基础，弥合了行星探测中几何表示和神经表示之间的差距。

title: Push-Placement: A Hybrid Approach Integrating Prehensile and Non-Prehensile Manipulation for Object Rearrangement
summary: Efficient tabletop rearrangement remains challenging due to collisions and the need for temporary buffering when target poses are obstructed. Prehensile pick-and-place provides precise control but often requires extra moves, whereas non-prehensile pushing can be more efficient but suffers from complex, imprecise dynamics. This paper proposes push-placement, a hybrid action primitive that uses the grasped object to displace obstructing items while being placed, thereby reducing explicit buffering. The method is integrated into a physics-in-the-loop Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) planner and evaluated in the PyBullet simulator. Empirical results show push-placement reduces the manipulator travel cost by up to 11.12% versus a baseline MCTS planner and 8.56% versus dynamic stacking. These findings indicate that hybrid prehensile/non-prehensile action primitives can substantially improve efficiency in long-horizon rearrangement tasks.
tldr: The paper introduces a "push-placement" action primitive, combining prehensile and non-prehensile manipulation, integrated within an MCTS planner to improve the efficiency of tabletop object rearrangement by strategically displacing obstructing objects during placement.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种“推-放置”的动作原语，结合了抓取和非抓取操作，集成到MCTS规划器中，通过在放置过程中策略性地移动阻挡物体，从而提高桌面物体重新排列的效率。
summary_zh: 高效的桌面重排仍然面临挑战，这主要是由于碰撞以及目标姿态被遮挡时需要临时缓冲。夹持式抓取放置能够提供精确的控制，但通常需要额外的移动，而非夹持式推移可能更高效，但受到复杂、不精确动力学的影响。本文提出推式放置，这是一种混合动作原语，它在使用抓取的物体进行放置的同时，将其用于位移遮挡物体，从而减少显式缓冲。该方法被集成到一个物理引擎闭环的蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）规划器中，并在PyBullet模拟器中进行评估。实验结果表明，与基线MCTS规划器相比，推式放置最多可减少11.12%的机械臂移动成本，与动态堆叠相比，可减少8.56%。这些发现表明，混合式夹持/非夹持动作原语可以显著提高长时程重排任务的效率。

title: AbracADDbra: Touch-Guided Object Addition by Decoupling Placement and Editing Subtasks
summary: Instruction-based object addition is often hindered by the ambiguity of text-only prompts or the tedious nature of mask-based inputs. To address this usability gap, we introduce AbracADDbra, a user-friendly framework that leverages intuitive touch priors to spatially ground succinct instructions for precise placement. Our efficient, decoupled architecture uses a vision-language transformer for touch-guided placement, followed by a diffusion model that jointly generates the object and an instance mask for high-fidelity blending. To facilitate standardized evaluation, we contribute the Touch2Add benchmark for this interactive task. Our extensive evaluations, where our placement model significantly outperforms both random placement and general-purpose VLM baselines, confirm the framework's ability to produce high-fidelity edits. Furthermore, our analysis reveals a strong correlation between initial placement accuracy and final edit quality, validating our decoupled approach. This work thus paves the way for more accessible and efficient creative tools.
tldr: The paper introduces AbracADDbra, a touch-guided framework for object addition that decouples placement and editing using a vision-language transformer and a diffusion model, along with a new benchmark dataset Touch2Add.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AbracADDbra，一个通过触摸引导的对象添加框架，它使用视觉-语言转换器和扩散模型分离放置和编辑任务，并提出了一个新的基准数据集Touch2Add。
summary_zh: 基于指令的物体添加常常受限于纯文本提示的歧义性或基于掩码输入繁琐性。为了解决这一可用性缺陷，我们提出了 AbracADDbra，一个用户友好的框架，它利用直观的触摸先验来空间定位简洁的指令，实现精确放置。我们高效的、解耦的架构使用视觉-语言 Transformer 进行触摸引导的放置，然后使用扩散模型联合生成物体和实例掩码，以实现高保真度的融合。为了方便标准化评估，我们为这个交互式任务贡献了 Touch2Add 基准数据集。我们的大量评估表明，我们的放置模型显著优于随机放置和通用的 VLM 基线，证实了该框架生成高保真编辑的能力。此外，我们的分析揭示了初始放置精度与最终编辑质量之间存在很强的相关性，验证了我们的解耦方法。因此，这项工作为更易于访问和更高效的创意工具铺平了道路。

title: SkillJect: Automating Stealthy Skill-Based Prompt Injection for Coding Agents with Trace-Driven Closed-Loop Refinement
summary: Agent skills are becoming a core abstraction in coding agents, packaging long-form instructions and auxiliary scripts to extend tool-augmented behaviors. This abstraction introduces an under-measured attack surface: skill-based prompt injection, where poisoned skills can steer agents away from user intent and safety policies. In practice, naive injections often fail because the malicious intent is too explicit or drifts too far from the original skill, leading agents to ignore or refuse them; existing attacks are also largely hand-crafted. We propose the first automated framework for stealthy prompt injection tailored to agent skills. The framework forms a closed loop with three agents: an Attack Agent that synthesizes injection skills under explicit stealth constraints, a Code Agent that executes tasks using the injected skills in a realistic tool environment, and an Evaluate Agent that logs action traces (e.g., tool calls and file operations) and verifies whether targeted malicious behaviors occurred. We also propose a malicious payload hiding strategy that conceals adversarial operations in auxiliary scripts while injecting optimized inducement prompts to trigger tool execution. Extensive experiments across diverse coding-agent settings and real-world software engineering tasks show that our method consistently achieves high attack success rates under realistic settings.
tldr: The paper introduces SkillJect, an automated framework for stealthily injecting malicious prompts into coding agents using skills, achieving high attack success rates in realistic software engineering tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SkillJect，一个自动化的框架，用于通过技能隐蔽地将恶意提示注入到编码代理中，并在实际的软件工程任务中实现了很高的攻击成功率。
summary_zh: 智能体技能正逐渐成为编码智能体的核心抽象，其打包长格式指令和辅助脚本以扩展工具增强的行为。这种抽象引入了一个未被充分衡量的攻击面：基于技能的提示注入，其中被污染的技能可能将智能体引导偏离用户意图和安全策略。在实践中，幼稚的注入常常失败，因为恶意意图过于明显或偏离原始技能太远，导致智能体忽略或拒绝它们；现有的攻击也大多是手工制作的。我们提出了第一个自动化框架，用于专门针对智能体技能的隐蔽式提示注入。该框架形成一个闭环，包含三个智能体：攻击智能体，其在明确的隐蔽性约束下合成注入技能；编码智能体，其在真实的工具环境中使用注入的技能执行任务；评估智能体，其记录行动轨迹（例如，工具调用和文件操作），并验证是否发生了目标恶意行为。我们还提出了一种恶意负载隐藏策略，该策略在辅助脚本中隐藏对抗性操作，同时注入优化的诱导提示以触发工具执行。在各种编码智能体设置和现实世界软件工程任务中的大量实验表明，我们的方法在现实环境中始终如一地实现了高攻击成功率。

title: Process-Supervised Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Reliable Clinical Reasoning
summary: Clinical decision-making requires nuanced reasoning over heterogeneous evidence and traceable justifications. While recent LLM multi-agent systems (MAS) show promise, they largely optimise for outcome accuracy while overlooking process-grounded reasoning aligned with clinical standards. One critical real-world case of this is gene-disease validity curation, where experts must determine whether a gene is causally implicated in a disease by synthesising diverse biomedical evidence. We introduce an agent-as-tool reinforcement learning framework for this task with two objectives: (i) process-level supervision to ensure reasoning follows valid clinical pathways, and (ii) efficient coordination via a hierarchical multi-agent system. Our evaluation on the ClinGen dataset shows that with outcome-only rewards, MAS with a GRPO-trained Qwen3-4B supervisor agent substantially improves final outcome accuracy from 0.195 with a base model supervisor to 0.732, but results in poor process alignment (0.392 F1). Conversely, with process + outcome rewards, MAS with GRPO-trained supervisor achieves higher outcome accuracy (0.750) while significantly improving process fidelity to 0.520 F1. Our code is available at https://github.com/chaeeunlee-io/GeneDiseaseCurationAgents.
tldr: The paper introduces a process-supervised MARL framework for clinical reasoning, specifically gene-disease validity curation, using hierarchical multi-agent systems and reinforcement learning to improve both outcome accuracy and process fidelity, validated on the ClinGen dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个过程监督的MARL框架，用于临床推理，特别是基因-疾病有效性管理，使用分层多智能体系统和强化学习来提高结果准确性和过程保真度，并在ClinGen数据集上进行了验证。
summary_zh: 临床决策需要对异构证据进行细致推理并提供可追溯的论证。 近期的大语言模型多智能体系统(MAS)展现出潜力，但它们主要优化结果准确率，而忽略了与临床标准对齐的过程导向推理。 其中一个关键的现实案例是基因-疾病关联有效性整理，专家必须通过综合各类生物医学证据来确定某个基因是否与某种疾病存在因果关系。 我们针对此任务引入了一种基于工具的智能体强化学习框架，其目标有两个：(i)过程层面监督，以确保推理遵循有效的临床路径，以及(ii)通过分层多智能体系统实现高效的协作。 我们在ClinGen数据集上的评估表明，仅使用结果奖励时，采用经过GRPO训练的Qwen3-4B监督智能体的MAS将最终结果准确率从基础模型监督器的0.195大幅提高到0.732，但导致过程对齐度不佳（0.392 F1）。 相比之下，使用过程+结果奖励时，采用GRPO训练的监督智能体的MAS实现了更高的结果准确率（0.750），同时显著提高了过程保真度至0.520 F1。 我们的代码已在https://github.com/chaeeunlee-io/GeneDiseaseCurationAgents上提供。

title: Prompt-Driven Low-Altitude Edge Intelligence: Modular Agents and Generative Reasoning
summary: The large artificial intelligence models (LAMs) show strong capabilities in perception, reasoning, and multi-modal understanding, and can enable advanced capabilities in low-altitude edge intelligence. However, the deployment of LAMs at the edge remains constrained by some fundamental limitations. First, tasks are rigidly tied to specific models, limiting the flexibility. Besides, the computational and memory demands of full-scale LAMs exceed the capacity of most edge devices. Moreover, the current inference pipelines are typically static, making it difficult to respond to real-time changes of tasks. To address these challenges, we propose a prompt-to-agent edge cognition framework (P2AECF), enabling the flexible, efficient, and adaptive edge intelligence. Specifically, P2AECF transforms high-level semantic prompts into executable reasoning workflows through three key mechanisms. First, the prompt-defined cognition parses task intent into abstract and model-agnostic representations. Second, the agent-based modular execution instantiates these tasks using lightweight and reusable cognitive agents dynamically selected based on current resource conditions. Third, the diffusion-controlled inference planning adaptively constructs and refines execution strategies by incorporating runtime feedback and system context. In addition, we illustrate the framework through a representative low-altitude intelligent network use case, showing its ability to deliver adaptive, modular, and scalable edge intelligence for real-time low-altitude aerial collaborations.
tldr: This paper introduces a prompt-driven framework (P2AECF) for low-altitude edge intelligence, enabling flexible, efficient, and adaptive task execution using modular agents and generative reasoning with lightweight models.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种提示驱动的低空边缘智能框架（P2AECF），它通过模块化代理和生成式推理，利用轻量级模型实现灵活、高效和自适应的任务执行。
summary_zh: 大型人工智能模型(LAMs)在感知、推理和多模态理解方面表现出强大的能力，并能赋能低空边缘智能中的高级功能。然而，LAMs在边缘的部署仍然受到一些根本性限制的制约。首先，任务与特定模型紧密绑定，限制了灵活性。此外，全尺寸LAMs的计算和内存需求超过了大多数边缘设备的容量。而且，当前的推理流水线通常是静态的，难以响应任务的实时变化。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种提示词到智能体边缘认知框架(P2AECF)，以实现灵活、高效和自适应的边缘智能。具体而言，P2AECF通过三个关键机制将高层语义提示词转换为可执行的推理工作流。首先，提示词定义的认知将任务意图解析为抽象且与模型无关的表示。其次，基于智能体的模块化执行使用基于当前资源状况动态选择的轻量级且可重用的认知智能体实例化这些任务。第三，扩散控制的推理规划通过结合运行时反馈和系统上下文自适应地构建和优化执行策略。此外，我们通过一个具有代表性的低空智能网络用例来说明该框架，展示了其为实时低空空中协作提供自适应、模块化和可扩展边缘智能的能力。

title: A Generalizable Physics-guided Causal Model for Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Driving
summary: Trajectory prediction for traffic agents is critical for safe autonomous driving. However, achieving effective zero-shot generalization in previously unseen domains remains a significant challenge. Motivated by the consistent nature of kinematics across diverse domains, we aim to incorporate domain-invariant knowledge to enhance zero-shot trajectory prediction capabilities. The key challenges include: 1) effectively extracting domain-invariant scene representations, and 2) integrating invariant features with kinematic models to enable generalized predictions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel generalizable Physics-guided Causal Model (PCM), which comprises two core components: a Disentangled Scene Encoder, which adopts intervention-based disentanglement to extract domain-invariant features from scenes, and a CausalODE Decoder, which employs a causal attention mechanism to effectively integrate kinematic models with meaningful contextual information. Extensive experiments on real-world autonomous driving datasets demonstrate our method's superior zero-shot generalization performance in unseen cities, significantly outperforming competitive baselines. The source code is released at https://github.com/ZY-Zong/Physics-guided-Causal-Model.
tldr: This paper proposes a Physics-guided Causal Model (PCM) for zero-shot trajectory prediction in autonomous driving by extracting domain-invariant scene representations and integrating them with kinematic models.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种物理引导的因果模型（PCM），用于自动驾驶中的零样本轨迹预测，通过提取域不变的场景表示并将其与运动学模型集成。
summary_zh: 交通参与者的轨迹预测对于安全自动驾驶至关重要。然而，在先前未见过的领域中实现有效的零样本泛化仍然是一个重大挑战。受不同领域动力学一致性的启发，我们的目标是融入领域不变的知识，以增强零样本轨迹预测能力。关键挑战包括：1) 有效提取领域不变的场景表征；2) 将不变特征与运动学模型相结合，以实现泛化预测。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的可泛化的物理引导因果模型（PCM），它包含两个核心组成部分：一个解耦场景编码器，采用基于干预的解耦来提取场景中的领域不变特征；以及一个因果ODE解码器，采用因果注意力机制来有效地将运动学模型与有意义的上下文信息相结合。在真实世界自动驾驶数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法在未见过的城市中表现出卓越的零样本泛化性能，显著优于具有竞争力的基线方法。源代码已发布在https://github.com/ZY-Zong/Physics-guided-Causal-Model。

title: GSRM: Generative Speech Reward Model for Speech RLHF
summary: Recent advances in speech language models, such as GPT-4o Voice Mode and Gemini Live, have demonstrated promising speech generation capabilities. Nevertheless, the aesthetic naturalness of the synthesized audio still lags behind that of human speech. Enhancing generation quality requires a reliable evaluator of speech naturalness. However, existing naturalness evaluators typically regress raw audio to scalar scores, offering limited interpretability of the evaluation and moreover fail to generalize to speech across different taxonomies. Inspired by recent advances in generative reward modeling, we propose the Generative Speech Reward Model (GSRM), a reasoning-centric reward model tailored for speech. The GSRM is trained to decompose speech naturalness evaluation into an interpretable acoustic feature extraction stage followed by feature-grounded chain-of-thought reasoning, enabling explainable judgments. To achieve this, we curated a large-scale human feedback dataset comprising 31k expert ratings and an out-of-domain benchmark of real-world user-assistant speech interactions. Experiments show that GSRM substantially outperforms existing speech naturalness predictors, achieving model-human correlation of naturalness score prediction that approaches human inter-rater consistency. We further show how GSRM can improve the naturalness of speech LLM generations by serving as an effective verifier for online RLHF.
tldr: The paper introduces GSRM, a generative speech reward model which decomposes speech naturalness evaluation, enabling explainable judgments and improving speech LLM generation via online RLHF.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种生成式语音奖励模型（GSRM），该模型分解了语音自然度评估，实现了可解释的判断，并通过在线RLHF改进了语音LLM的生成。
summary_zh: 语音语言模型的最新进展，例如 GPT-4o 的语音模式和 Gemini Live，已经展示了令人鼓舞的语音生成能力。然而，合成音频的美学自然度仍然落后于人类语音。提升生成质量需要一个可靠的语音自然度评估器。然而，现有的自然度评估器通常将原始音频回归到标量分数，对评估的解释性有限，并且无法推广到不同分类的语音。受到生成奖励建模最新进展的启发，我们提出了生成式语音奖励模型（GSRM），这是一种专为语音定制的以推理为中心的奖励模型。GSRM 经过训练，将语音自然度评估分解为可解释的声学特征提取阶段，然后进行基于特征的思维链推理，从而实现可解释的判断。为了实现这一点，我们整理了一个大规模的人工反馈数据集，其中包括 3.1 万个专家评分和一个真实世界用户-助手语音交互的领域外基准。实验表明，GSRM 明显优于现有的语音自然度预测器，在自然度评分预测方面实现了接近人类评分者间一致性的模型-人类相关性。我们进一步展示了 GSRM 如何通过充当在线 RLHF 的有效验证器来提高语音 LLM 生成的自然度。

title: MarsRetrieval: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Planetary-Scale Geospatial Retrieval on Mars
summary: Data-driven approaches like deep learning are rapidly advancing planetary science, particularly in Mars exploration. Despite recent progress, most existing benchmarks remain confined to closed-set supervised visual tasks and do not support text-guided retrieval for geospatial discovery. We introduce MarsRetrieval, a retrieval benchmark for evaluating vision-language models for Martian geospatial discovery. MarsRetrieval includes three tasks: (1) paired image-text retrieval, (2) landform retrieval, and (3) global geo-localization, covering multiple spatial scales and diverse geomorphic origins. We propose a unified retrieval-centric protocol to benchmark multimodal embedding architectures, including contrastive dual-tower encoders and generative vision-language models. Our evaluation shows MarsRetrieval is challenging: even strong foundation models often fail to capture domain-specific geomorphic distinctions. We further show that domain-specific fine-tuning is critical for generalizable geospatial discovery in planetary settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/ml-stat-Sustech/MarsRetrieval
tldr: The paper introduces MarsRetrieval, a new benchmark for evaluating vision-language models on Martian geospatial retrieval tasks, highlighting challenges and the need for domain-specific fine-tuning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MarsRetrieval，一个新的基准，用于评估视觉-语言模型在火星地理空间检索任务上的性能，强调了挑战以及领域特定微调的必要性。
summary_zh: 深度学习等数据驱动方法正在迅速推动行星科学的发展，尤其是在火星探测领域。尽管近年来取得了进展，但现有的大多数基准测试仍然局限于闭集监督视觉任务，且不支持用于地理空间发现的文本引导检索。我们引入了MarsRetrieval，一个评估视觉-语言模型用于火星地理空间发现的检索基准。MarsRetrieval包含三个任务：（1）配对图像-文本检索，（2）地貌检索，以及（3）全球地理定位，覆盖了多个空间尺度和不同的地貌成因。我们提出了一种以检索为中心的统一协议来评估多模态嵌入架构，包括对比双塔编码器和生成式视觉-语言模型。我们的评估表明MarsRetrieval具有挑战性：即使是强大的基础模型也常常无法捕捉特定领域的地貌差异。我们进一步表明，特定领域的微调对于行星环境中可泛化的地理空间发现至关重要。我们的代码可在https://github.com/ml-stat-Sustech/MarsRetrieval获取。

title: Synthetic Dataset Generation and Validation for Robotic Surgery Instrument Segmentation
summary: This paper presents a comprehensive workflow for generating and validating a synthetic dataset designed for robotic surgery instrument segmentation. A 3D reconstruction of the Da Vinci robotic arms was refined and animated in Autodesk Maya through a fully automated Python-based pipeline capable of producing photorealistic, labeled video sequences. Each scene integrates randomized motion patterns, lighting variations, and synthetic blood textures to mimic intraoperative variability while preserving pixel-accurate ground truth masks. To validate the realism and effectiveness of the generated data, several segmentation models were trained under controlled ratios of real and synthetic data. Results demonstrate that a balanced composition of real and synthetic samples significantly improves model generalization compared to training on real data only, while excessive reliance on synthetic data introduces a measurable domain shift. The proposed framework provides a reproducible and scalable tool for surgical computer vision, supporting future research in data augmentation, domain adaptation, and simulation-based pretraining for robotic-assisted surgery. Data and code are available at https://github.com/EIDOSLAB/Sintetic-dataset-DaVinci.
tldr: The paper introduces a pipeline for generating synthetic datasets of robotic surgery instrument images with corresponding labels and demonstrates its utility in improving segmentation models when combined with real data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种用于生成带有相应标签的机器人手术器械图像的合成数据集的流程，并展示了其在结合真实数据时改进分割模型的效用。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一个全面的工作流程，用于生成和验证一个为机器人手术器械分割设计的合成数据集。Da Vinci 机器人手臂的 3D 重建模型在 Autodesk Maya 中经过精细化处理和动画化，该过程通过一个完全自动化的基于 Python 的管道实现，能够生成逼真的、带有标签的视频序列。 每个场景都集成了随机的运动模式、光照变化和合成血液纹理，以模拟术中变化，同时保留像素级精确的真值掩码。为了验证生成数据的真实性和有效性，我们训练了多个不同真实数据和合成数据比例下的分割模型。结果表明，与仅使用真实数据训练相比，真实样本和合成样本的平衡组合显著提高了模型的泛化能力，而过度依赖合成数据会引入可度量的域漂移。所提出的框架为手术计算机视觉提供了一个可复现和可扩展的工具，支持未来在数据增强、领域自适应以及机器人辅助手术的基于仿真的预训练方面的研究。数据和代码可在 https://github.com/EIDOSLAB/Sintetic-dataset-DaVinci 获取。

title: QuRL: Efficient Reinforcement Learning with Quantized Rollout
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a trending paradigm for training reasoning large language models (LLMs). However, due to the autoregressive decoding nature of LLMs, the rollout process becomes the efficiency bottleneck of RL training, consisting of up to 70\% of the total training time. In this work, we propose Quantized Reinforcement Learning (QuRL) that uses a quantized actor for accelerating the rollout. We address two challenges in QuRL. First, we propose Adaptive Clipping Range (ACR) that dynamically adjusts the clipping ratio based on the policy ratio between the full-precision actor and the quantized actor, which is essential for mitigating long-term training collapse. Second, we identify the weight update problem, where weight changes between RL steps are extremely small, making it difficult for the quantization operation to capture them effectively. We mitigate this problem through the invariant scaling technique that reduces quantization noise and increases weight update. We evaluate our method with INT8 and FP8 quantization experiments on DeepScaleR and DAPO, and achieve 20% to 80% faster rollout during training.
tldr: The paper introduces QuRL, a method to accelerate reinforcement learning with LLMs by using a quantized actor network, including adaptive clipping range and invariant scaling to mitigate quantization issues, achieving 20-80% faster rollout.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了QuRL，一种利用量化actor网络加速LLM强化学习的方法。通过自适应裁剪范围和不变尺度缩放技术来减轻量化问题，实现了20-80%更快的rollout。
summary_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已成为训练具备推理能力的大型语言模型（LLMs）的一种流行范式。然而，由于LLMs的自回归解码特性，rollout过程成为了RL训练的效率瓶颈，占据了高达70%的总训练时间。在这项工作中，我们提出了量化强化学习（QuRL），该方法利用量化Actor加速rollout过程。我们解决了QuRL中的两个挑战。首先，我们提出了自适应裁剪范围（ACR），它可以基于全精度Actor和量化Actor之间的策略比动态调整裁剪比例，这对于缓解长期训练崩溃至关重要。其次，我们发现了权重更新问题，即RL步骤之间的权重变化非常小，导致量化操作难以有效地捕捉到这些变化。我们通过不变性缩放技术来缓解这个问题，该技术可以减少量化噪声并增加权重更新。我们使用INT8和FP8量化实验在DeepScaleR和DAPO上评估了我们的方法，并在训练期间实现了20%至80%的rollout加速。

title: SemanticFeels: Semantic Labeling during In-Hand Manipulation
summary: As robots become increasingly integrated into everyday tasks, their ability to perceive both the shape and properties of objects during in-hand manipulation becomes critical for adaptive and intelligent behavior. We present SemanticFeels, an extension of the NeuralFeels framework that integrates semantic labeling with neural implicit shape representation, from vision and touch. To illustrate its application, we focus on material classification: high-resolution Digit tactile readings are processed by a fine-tuned EfficientNet-B0 convolutional neural network (CNN) to generate local material predictions, which are then embedded into an augmented signed distance field (SDF) network that jointly predicts geometry and continuous material regions. Experimental results show that the system achieves a high correspondence between predicted and actual materials on both single- and multi-material objects, with an average matching accuracy of 79.87% across multiple manipulation trials on a multi-material object.
tldr: The paper presents SemanticFeels, a framework that integrates semantic labeling with neural implicit shape representation, using vision and high-resolution tactile data to achieve material classification during in-hand manipulation with high accuracy, achieving 79.87% matching accuracy on multi-material objects.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 SemanticFeels，一个将语义标记与神经隐式形状表示相结合的框架，通过使用视觉和高分辨率触觉数据，实现了手中操作期间的材料分类，在多材料对象上实现了 79.87% 的匹配精度。
summary_zh: 随着机器人越来越多地融入日常任务，它们在手内操作过程中感知物体的形状和属性的能力对于自适应和智能行为至关重要。我们提出了SemanticFeels，它是NeuralFeels框架的扩展，将语义标注与来自视觉和触觉的神经隐式形状表示相结合。为了说明其应用，我们专注于材料分类：高分辨率的Digit触觉读数由微调的EfficientNet-B0卷积神经网络（CNN）处理，以生成局部材料预测，然后将其嵌入到增强的符号距离场（SDF）网络中，该网络共同预测几何形状和连续材料区域。实验结果表明，该系统在单材料和多材料物体上都实现了预测材料与实际材料之间的高度对应，在多材料物体的多次操作试验中，平均匹配精度达到79.87%。

title: Simultaneous State Estimation and Online Model Learning in a Soft Robotic System
summary: Operating complex real-world systems, such as soft robots, can benefit from precise predictive control schemes that require accurate state and model knowledge. This knowledge is typically not available in practical settings and must be inferred from noisy measurements. In particular, it is challenging to simultaneously estimate unknown states and learn a model online from sequentially arriving measurements. In this paper, we show how a recently proposed gray-box system identification tool enables the estimation of a soft robot's current pose while at the same time learning a bending stiffness model. For estimation and learning, we rely solely on a nominal constant-curvature robot model and measurements of the robot's base reactions (e.g., base forces). The estimation scheme -- relying on a marginalized particle filter -- allows us to conveniently interface nominal constant-curvature equations with a Gaussian Process (GP) bending stiffness model to be learned. This, in contrast to estimation via a random walk over stiffness values, enables prediction of bending stiffness and improves overall model quality. We demonstrate, using real-world soft-robot data, that the method learns a bending stiffness model online while accurately estimating the robot's pose. Notably, reduced multi-step forward-prediction errors indicate that the learned bending-stiffness GP improves overall model quality.
tldr: This paper presents a method for simultaneously estimating the pose and learning the bending stiffness model of a soft robot online using a marginalized particle filter and Gaussian Process, demonstrating improved model quality with real-world data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用边缘化粒子滤波和高斯过程同时估计软机器人的姿态并在线学习其弯曲刚度模型的方法，并通过真实世界的数据验证了模型质量的提高。
summary_zh: 操作复杂的现实系统，例如软体机器人，可以受益于精确的预测控制方案，这些方案需要准确的状态和模型知识。然而，这种知识通常在实际环境中无法获得，必须从带噪声的测量数据中推断出来。特别地，同时估计未知状态并从顺序到达的测量数据中在线学习模型是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们展示了最近提出的一种灰盒系统辨识工具如何能够实现对软体机器人当前姿态的估计，同时学习其弯曲刚度模型。为了进行估计和学习，我们仅依赖于一个名义上的恒定曲率机器人模型和机器人基座反作用力（例如，基座力）的测量值。该估计方案——依赖于边缘化粒子滤波——允许我们方便地将名义恒定曲率方程与待学习的高斯过程（GP）弯曲刚度模型对接。这与通过刚度值上的随机游走进行估计形成对比，能够预测弯曲刚度并提高整体模型质量。我们使用真实的软体机器人数据证明，该方法能够在线学习弯曲刚度模型，同时准确估计机器人的姿态。值得注意的是，减少的多步前向预测误差表明，学习到的弯曲刚度 GP 提高了整体模型质量。

title: Joint Task Assistance Planning via Nested Branch and Bound (Extended Version)
summary: We introduce and study the Joint Task Assistance Planning problem which generalizes prior work on optimizing assistance in robotic collaboration. In this setting, two robots operate over predefined roadmaps, each represented as a graph corresponding to its configuration space. One robot, the task robot, must execute a timed mission, while the other, the assistance robot, provides sensor-based support that depends on their spatial relationship. The objective is to compute a path for both robots that maximizes the total duration of assistance given.
